name: bootstrap eval: bootstrap scenarios consume seed/fp-examples/<rule-id>/examples.jsonl as expected-fail inputs
command: mkdir -p "$PWD/seed-test/seed/fp-examples/g-ts-001" && echo '{"bootstrap_seed":true,"input":"any","expected":"fail"}' > "$PWD/seed-test/seed/fp-examples/g-ts-001/examples.jsonl" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --seed-root "$PWD/seed-test/seed" --emit-report "$PWD/report.json" && grep "g-ts-001" report.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
